caption: A video conference call features a gallery of participants in their respective home or office settings. Several individuals appear multiple times in the grid, including a man in a blue shirt, a man in a gray shirt, a man wearing headphones, and a woman with long dark hair. Other participants include a man in a white shirt, a man in a blue t-shirt, a woman with glasses, and a man in a green shirt. On-screen text identifies some participants as "Jerry McKay", "David Borman", "Clark Quinn", "Susan Merck", "Dylan Labo", and "charles Mass". One person's background features a circular yellow and black logo. As the video progresses, the arrangement of the video tiles shifts. A man with a beard and gray hair appears in one frame, and a man in a blue shirt is seen talking and gesturing with his hand in the final sequence.
